name: @ecruz165/skillzkit-types
description: TypeScript types for the skillzkit catalog. Source of truth for apps/skillzkit/schema/catalog.schema.json (generated via ts-json-schema-generator). Consumed by skillzkit itself and by agentx-platform's controlplane-ui.

scripts.verify:schema: ts-json-schema-generator --path src/index.ts --type Catalog --tsconfig tsconfig.json --no-type-check | diff -u ../../apps/skillzkit/schema/catalog.schema.json - && echo 'schema is up to date'
